name: asochan-ai
description: Production-grade Claude Code skills: Zero Leak quality defense, workflow automation, skill creation, and content tools. Works on 35+ platforms.

plugins.name: super-plan
plugins.description: Evidence-based design docs with 4 parallel research agents.

plugins.name: rapid-build
plugins.description: Execute approved design docs with baseline reuse and quality gates.

plugins.name: execution-strategy
plugins.description: Auto-select optimal execution method after planning.

plugins.name: parallel-tasks
plugins.description: Parallelize 5+ independent tasks with Agent Teams.

plugins.name: risk-scan
plugins.description: Zero Leak L1: Map blast radius before starting any task.

plugins.name: quality-rules
plugins.description: Zero Leak L2: Enforce rules during implementation.

plugins.name: review-guard
plugins.description: Zero Leak L3: Independent inspector before presenting to user.

plugins.name: leak-learner
plugins.description: Zero Leak L5: Semi-auto learning from user corrections.

plugins.name: test-runner
plugins.description: Auto-detect and run test frameworks.

plugins.name: security-scan
plugins.description: 3-stage security audit with parallel attacker agents.

plugins.name: incident-triage-lite
plugins.description: Create incident logs and search similar past incidents.

plugins.name: neo-skill-creator
plugins.description: Create Q1-Q10 compliant skills from scratch.

plugins.name: skill-upgrade
plugins.description: Upgrade existing skills to production quality standards.

plugins.name: plan-to-study
plugins.description: Generate study guides from design docs.

plugins.name: auto-browser
plugins.description: Browser automation with 5-min rule and CDP fallback.

plugins.name: research-organizer
plugins.description: Detect folder bloat and auto-organize into subfolders.

plugins.name: presentation-architect
plugins.description: Design and generate professional slide decks.

plugins.name: frontend-slides
plugins.description: HTML slide generation engine with 12 style presets.

plugins.name: svg-diagram
plugins.description: Generate SVG diagrams with type x color design system.

plugins.name: prep-workspace
plugins.description: Prepare workspace: branch, status, prior work check.

plugins.name: merge-guard
plugins.description: Quality gate before merge: test, security audit, approval, push.

plugins.name: project-checkup
plugins.description: Project-wide health check: git, PRs, security scan.
